ScreeningSession.title: Screening Session
ScreeningSession.description: A record of a single CV screening and ranking session.

jdText.description: The job description used for the screening.

timestamp.description: The date and time the session was created.

uid.description: The user ID of the person who created the session.

results.description: The list of ranked candidates for this session.

CandidateResult.title: Candidate Result
CandidateResult.description: The ranking and analysis for a single candidate.

fileName.description: The name of the candidate's CV file.

aiSummary.description: The AI-generated summary/explanation for this candidate.
